narrative:
Twinsburg 5-C (precinct in Summit County) has 998 registered voters, with 52.9% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 19.2% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 27.9%, a clear Democratic lean of 8.6 percentage points.
